title: contact_set: empty or unknown-only patch drops ID from both maps
description: Trigger: ChatContact/set with {update: {someId: {}}} or {update: {someId: {bogus: 1}}}. Neither the blocked nor displayName branch executes, any_update stays false, and the ID appears in neither updated nor notUpdated. RFC 8620 §7.1 requires every ID in update to appear in exactly one of updated or notUpdated. A conforming JMAP client will treat missing IDs as a protocol error. Fix: add an else branch that inserts into notUpdated with type=invalidProperties when no recognized field was found.
close_reason: Fixed in daemon/src/store.rs and daemon/src/jmap.rs; 7 new regression tests added
